title: 以下、進めて。本番環境で動作するか確認せよ。 • 解決しました。Hybrid Failover の即 fail 文言は AGENTS.md で recovery matrix 前提に修正し、run- kernel-council-review.sh には実際の recovery retry を追加しました。最初の council 判定が落ちて も、1 回だけ force_copilot_continuity + gemini/xai backfill + metered override で再試行し、それ でもだめなときだけ fail します。あわせて test-shadow-continui...
summary_text: - Confirmed: at `2aa581c`, same-repo/external split exists under `workspace-preflight`, but `implement` still uses single `Checkout target repository` with `token: ${{ secrets.TARGET_REPO_PAT || github.token }}`. That matches the prod symptom exactly. [.github/workflows/fugue-codex-implement.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-codex-implement.yml#L533) [.github/workflows/fugue-codex-implement.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-codex-implement.yml#L673) - Minimal patch scope: change only `implement` checkout block to the same two-step pattern: 1. `Checkout current target repository` (`if target_repo == github.repository`, no explicit token). 2. `Checkout external target repository` (`if target_repo != github.repository`, keep PAT token). Leave `workspace-preflight` behavior unchanged to avoid unrelated churn. - Minimum robust hardening (small, recommended): stop using `TARGET_REPO_PAT` for orchestration-repo checkout; use `github.token` there. Current PAT-first pattern can trigger a second auth failure after target checkout is fixed. [.github/workflows/fugue-codex-implement.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-codex-implement.yml#L685) - Likely regressions to watch: external target checkout path (private repo PAT scope), and backup-heavy runner path still reaching implement checkout. Existing guard test already expects split in implement, so run it as primary regression gate. [tests/test-vote-command-implement-guard.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-vote-command-implement-guard.sh#L59)
